rationale: Multiple new local users were created via 'net user /add' (A0, EV-001) and one was added to the 'administrators' group (EV-002). While the accounts were subsequently deleted (EV-003, EV-004, EV-005), the creation of privileged accounts indicates malicious intent, even if cleaned up. The parent process for all these actions is PowerShell, executing an encoded command.
